ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "satisfaction_level" REAL /* Employee's satisfaction level (0-1) */,
  "last_evaluation" REAL /* Last evaluation score of the employee */,
  "number_projects" INTEGER /* Number of projects handled by the employee */,
  "average_monthly_hours" INTEGER /* Average monthly hours worked by the employee */,
  "time_spent_company" INTEGER /* Years spent in the company */,
  "work_accident" INTEGER /* Indicator of work accidents (0 or 1) */,
  "left" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the employee left the company (0 or 1) */,
  "promotion_last_5years" INTEGER /* Number of promotions in the last 5 years */,
  "sales" TEXT /* Sales department the employee belongs to */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary level of the employee (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the company (if applicable) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the departments table */,
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the salaries table */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_salary_id FOREIGN KEY ("salary_id") REFERENCES salaries ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_sales FOREIGN KEY ("sales") REFERENCES departments ("department_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., sales, HR, IT) */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary level */,
  "salary_level" TEXT /* Level of salary (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum salary for this level */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum salary for this level */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the salary is paid */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary range became effective */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next salary review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who received the promotion */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date when the promotion occurred */,
  "new_role" TEXT /* New role of the employee post-promotion */,
  "previous_role" TEXT /* Previous role of the employee before the promotion */,
  "promotion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the promotion */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who approved the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee involved in the accident */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* Date the accident occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the accident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reported the accident */,
  "follow_up_actions" TEXT /* Actions taken after the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_accidents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score received in the evaluation */,
  "evaluator" TEXT /* Name of the person who conducted the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., performance, 360-degree) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
